name: Birds of Prey
description: Eagles, falcons, owls — powerful hunters of the sky.
descriptionZh: 鹰、隼、猫头鹰——天空中的强大猎手。

name: Ocean Birds
description: Penguins, albatrosses, and birds of the open sea.
descriptionZh: 企鹅、信天翁和远洋海鸟。

name: Rainforest Birds
description: Colorful birds of tropical forests and canopy life.
descriptionZh: 热带雨林与树冠层的多彩鸟类。

name: Migratory Birds
description: Long-distance travelers that cross continents and oceans.
descriptionZh: 跨越大陆与海洋的长途旅行家。

name: Colorful Birds
description: Some of the brightest and most beautiful plumage on Earth.
descriptionZh: 地球上最艳丽夺目的羽毛明星。
